content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Business   Industry specific banking   NAB Health banking and finance solutions   Financial specialists for healthcare businesses   Financial specialists for healthcare businesses   Tailored banking and finance services that specialise in supporting healthcare businesses and health professionals.  Request a callback   View financial products   NAB Health - Financial specialists for health professionals  NAB Health has more than 20 years’ experience supporting health professionals. We have a dedicated team of experienced health bankers and specialists who understand the unique challenges of running a healthcare business.  How NAB Health can help you  Our experts provide financial solutions for all health segments including:  general practitioners  medical specialists  dentists  allied health professionals  pharmacists  veterinarians  aged care and hospitals   large healthcare businesses.  Our dedicated team provide support and expertise throughout your journey in healthcare, from personal banking to growing a business. We have an integrated offer that can serve your changing financial needs, leaving you free to focus your attention where it’s needed most.  Seamless integration with Medfin and HICAPS  We understand that the best financial solutions for healthcare businesses are integrated, combining a range of services to make the complex simple. NAB Health helps you achieve this with solutions that incorporate personal and business finances, with industry-specific loans through Medfin, opens in new window   and health-claims billing services with HICAPS, opens in new window  .   Recommended financial products  Loans and finance   Medical equipment finance   NAB Business Loans   Medfin line of credit , opens in new window   Practice and property finance   Medfin practice purchase finance , opens in new window   Medfin practice property loans , opens in new window   Medfin Classifieds , opens in new window   HICAPS, vehicles, fitout and equipment   HICAPS Terminals , opens in new window   Medfin asset finance , opens in new window   NAB business vehicle and equipment finance   Latest updates from Health View   Receive monthly podcasts, webinars, quarterly Australian wellbeing reports and more, straight to your inbox.  Subscribe now   Explore the latest Health View updates , opens in new window   Get in touch   Sales enquiries   Let us help with your business banking needs. Request a call back to chat with one of our health specialists.  Call me back   Contact us   Explore our business banking contact information and get support with a wide range of products, services and topics.  View all business banking contacts   Visit a NAB business banking centre   Let our business banking specialists help you in person.
